svg.title: ShopFront full system architecture
svg.desc: End-to-end ShopFront architecture: a user reaches CloudFront over HTTPS serving a private S3 static site; the contact form posts to API Gateway, which invokes a Lambda that validates input, writes to DynamoDB, and publishes to SNS for email notification, across presentation, application, and data tiers.

g.text: Serverless · scales to zero when idle · ~$0 at portfolio traffic
Only the form needs compute; everything else is static + edge-cached
